name: Tiramisu Btvc62a
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk egg yolks, sugar, and Marsala in a large metal bowl until blended.
2. Set the bowl over a saucepan of simmering water (do not allow water to touch the bottom of the bowl). Mix with an electric mixer until the mixture triples in volume, about 5 minutes.
3. Cover and refrigerate the zabaglione until well chilled. It can be prepared up to 2 days ahead.
4. In a large bowl, whip mascarpone with cream and sugar until soft peaks form.
5. Fold the whipped mascarpone into the chilled zabaglione.
6. Refrigerate the mixture until well chilled, about 3 hours.
7. Combine espresso coffee, rum, sugar, and vanilla in a small bowl.
8. Brush both sides of cake pieces with the coffee mixture.
9. Place a generous spoonful of mascarpone mixture at the bottom of each of 8 balloon-shaped glasses.
10. Set the cake square or wedge into each glass at an angle.
11. Top with the remaining mascarpone mixture.
12. Combine shaved chocolate and finely ground espresso coffee. Sprinkle over desserts.
13. Refrigerate until chilled for at least 30 minutes to up to 3 hours before serving.
